---
title: "TCMSAR26"
---

![](./img/old_map.jpg)

 **Course website**: <https://jmburgos.github.io/TCMSAR26/>
 **Source**: <https://github.com/jmburgos/TCMSAR26/>


## Schedule (flexble...things can change)

| Day | Time | Session | Topics |
|----------------|----------------|---------------------|-------------------|
| Mon | 10:00–11:00 | [Introduction](intro.qmd) | Course overview, R & RStudio setup, tidyverse, Quarto |
| Mon | 11:00–13:00 | [Spatial data concepts](spatial_data.qmd) | Vector vs raster models, points/lines/polygons, sp vs sf ecosystem |
| Mon | 14:00–17:00 | [Mapping with ggplot — part 1](ggplot1.qmd) |  |
| Tue | 09:00–12:00 | [Simple features (sf)](sf.qmd) | sfg / sfc / sf class structure, building sf objects, POINT & LINESTRING geometries; Making sf objects from data frames, operating with attributes, class Spatial |
| Tue | 13:00–15:15 | [Coordinate reference systems](crs.qmd) | Ellipsoids, datums, projections, PROJ/EPSG, st_transform(), CRS in ggplot |
| Tue | 15:30–17:00 | [Mapping with ggplot — part 2](ggplot2.qmd) | Colour scales, ICES rectangles, scalebars, north arrows, customization |
| Wed | 09:00–10:45 | [Working with geometries](geometric.qmd) | Sampling, centroids, buffers, convex/concave hulls, grids, simplification |
| Wed | 11:00–12:00 | [Working with geometries](geometric.qmd) | Measurements, distances, aggregation, attribute-geometry relationships |
| Wed | 13:00–14:30 | [Spatial operations](spatial_ops.qmd) | Binary predicates, DE-9IM model, spatial subsetting, spatial joins |
| Wed | 14:45–17:00 | [Rasters](rasters.qmd) | Raster data model, RasterLayer / Brick / Stack, reading files, metadata |
| Thu | 09:00–09:30 | [Rasters](rasters.qmd) | Resampling, reprojecting, rasterization, ggplot with rasters, stars package |
| Thu | 09:30–10:30 | [Reading & writing spatial data](input_output.qmd) | GDAL, shapefiles, GeoPackages, CSVs, st_read() / st_write() |
| Thu | 10:45–12:00 | [Interactive maps](interactive.qmd) | leaflet basics, data input, layer calls, colour mapping, basemaps |
| Thu | 13:00–17:00 | [Interactive maps](interactive.qmd) | Polygons, lines, rasters, layer controls, mapdeck for large datasets |
| Fri | 09:00–12:00 | [Interpolation](interpolation.qmd) | Voronoi polygons, nearest-neighbour, IDW; Kriging with variogram fitting, GAMs |
| Fri | 13:00–14:00 | Wrap-up & open exercises | Participants work on data of their choice; instructors available for questions |

## Contact info

Julian M. Burgos Email: julian.burgos(at) hafogvatn.is

Francesco Golin  Email: francesco.golin(at)hafogvatn.is
